Home.heroBannerAlt: Illustration: learning, mindfulness, and exploring the world
Home.title: Learn, grow and find your people at Medoyid Club
Home.subtitle: Online courses, lectures and seminars for personal growth. Next stage — a social RPG environment with a world map, quests and matching by interests and personality type.
Home.featureCoursesDesc: Structured programs from practitioners: from self-discovery basics to leadership.
Home.featureProfileDesc: Study and develop your “Self” profile — your strengths and goals.
Home.featureSocialDesc: Coming soon: a world map, quests and compatible contacts by interests and goals.
Home.popularSubtitle: Start with what resonates with you.

Admin.title: Administration
Admin.subtitle: Users, roles, and author invites.
Admin.inviteHint: The author receives an email with a link. Until the domain is verified, emails only arrive at your own inbox.

AuthorInvite.title: Become an author
AuthorInvite.intro: You have been invited to join Medoyid Club as an author.
AuthorInvite.benefits: Create courses, run a blog and a video library, and design your own page.
AuthorInvite.invalidText: The link is invalid. Ask an admin to send a new invite.
AuthorInvite.expiredText: The invite has expired. Ask for a new one.
AuthorInvite.loginText: Sign in or register with the same email the invite was sent to.
AuthorInvite.acceptedText: This invite has already been used.
AuthorInvite.mismatchText: The invite was sent to {email}. Sign in with that address.
